testing_centers.notes: In-person at Prometric testing centers; online proctoring available for some exams

id_requirements: Two forms of ID required: one government-issued photo ID (primary) and one secondary ID. Name on ID must match FINRA registration exactly.
exam_rules: Closed-book. No personal items in exam room. On-screen calculator provided. Scratch paper provided. No phones or electronic devices. Monitored by proctor.
renewal_options: FINRA licenses remain active as long as registered with a member firm. Regulatory Element continuing education required within 120 days of 2-year anniversary, then every 3 years. Firm Element CE also required annually. If registration lapses, must retake exam after 2+ years of inactivity.

retake_policy.notes: 30-day waiting period after first and second failed attempts. 180-day waiting period after third failed attempt and any subsequent failures. Full exam fee required for each retake.
